name: menhera-loop
description: Claude Code plugin for menhera-loop messaging and completion-state UI.

scripts.validate: node --check scripts/menhera-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/uninstall-ui.mjs && node --check scripts/session-start.mjs && node --check scripts/track-event.mjs && node --check scripts/verify-completion.mjs && node --test
